docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $250.00 FILED BY WILSON, STEPHEN DBA PREFERRED APPRAISAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT ARYAN, LEEZA DBA GLOBAL QUEST FINANCIAL REAL EST. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
